nodes.grounding_span: Collaboration. There's a lot of tweaking, going back and forth.

nodes.label: AI as skill development enabler
nodes.grounding_span: avoid leaning on it too heavily in order to avoid blunting my skill set

nodes.label: Personal authenticity and unique voice
nodes.grounding_span: construct texts in my personal style

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI summaries
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to use AI when I need to take large bodies of text or information and condense this down into key points

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for proofreading and coding
nodes.grounding_span: extremely frustrating, as the AI model kept making serious mistakes

nodes.label: Reluctance to use AI for writing
nodes.grounding_span: Anything truly creative, really. Otherwise, what's the point in me doing what I do?

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: I hope to keep using it as a tool, but will avoid leaning on it too heavily

nodes.label: Iterative prompt refinement
nodes.grounding_span: I refine my prompt and go again. I'll keep doing this until I get closer to where I want to be.

nodes.label: Domain-based boundary setting — clear separation of AI-appropriate vs. human-only tasks
nodes.grounding_span: My other work as a commissioning editor feels safer, as this is interpersonal, so I will have to focus my attention more on that kind of work.
